floorPlans.Name: Mint
floorPlans.Comment: The C2 Floor Plan epitomizes modern living in the heart of Tallahassee. This thoughtfully crafted 3 bed 3 bath layout spans a generous 1477 sq ft, seamlessly combining comfort and style. With features such as a sleek interior design and luxurious amenities, residents can enjoy an unparalleled living experience. Embrace the vibrant lifestyle of Tallahassee with this exceptional floor plan. Contact us today to schedule your tour.

floorPlans.Name: Caraway
floorPlans.Comment: Experience the thoughtfully crafted B2 Floor Plan in vibrant Tallahassee, offering a well-structured 2 Bed 2 Bath layout spread over 1,060 sq ft. The B2 Floor Plan showcases modern amenities including a private balcony, in-unit laundry, and premium kitchen finishes to cater to your contemporary living desires. Enjoy the convenience of a lifestyle that balances comfort and innovation. Contact us today to schedule your tour of this exceptional floor plan.

floorPlans.Name: Myrtle
floorPlans.Comment: Welcome to the C1 Floor Plan in Tallahassee, offering a generously proportioned 3 bed, 3 bath layout with a consistent space of 1476 sq ft. This thoughtfully crafted home provides a blend of contemporary design and functionality. Experience delightful living with features such as high-end amenities and practical in-home conveniences. Embark on a journey of comfort and convenience in this remarkable floor plan. Contact us today to schedule your tour and see it for yourself.

floorPlans.Name: Nutmeg
floorPlans.Comment: The C3 Floor Plan offers a distinctive living experience in the heart of Tallahassee. This 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom layout spans 1523 sq ft, providing ample space for a modern lifestyle. Relish in high-end amenities including a state-of-the-art kitchen and open living spaces that are perfect for entertaining. Enjoy convenient access to local attractions and a vibrant community atmosphere. Contact us today to schedule your tour and envision your new lifestyle in the C3 Floor Plan.
